# kSecInputIsAttributeName

**Global Variable**

The type of input to the transform.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecInputIsAttributeName: CFString
```

## Discussion

Use one of the values listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes#Input-Types].
